modules.name: Command Center Foundation
modules.proof: Command Center aggregates foundation health across Repair Shop, Recovery, Build, Env, Portable Ready, Model Check, Scan Bridge, Project Docs, and Extension Manager.

modules.name: Command Center Detail Viewer
modules.proof: A selected foundation can be inspected with status, health, metrics, source, page, endpoint, related paths, and safety contract.

modules.name: Command Center Dashboard Card
modules.proof: Command Bridge can display Command Center health, score, clear/advisory/attention counts, latest repair action, and latest recovery event.

modules.name: Command Center History / Archive Viewer
modules.proof: Command Center archive can scan foundation/detail/dashboard reports, build a timeline and trend, and report archive errors.
modules.health: COMMAND CENTER ARCHIVE HEALTHY — ADVISORIES ONLY

advisories.title: Environment Verify
advisories.summary: 9/10 checks passed; required problems 0; optional tools available 0/8.
advisories.recommended_action: Optional tools can remain advisory; use the dependency plan only when intentionally approved.

advisories.title: Dashboard card exports are optional
advisories.summary: Archive currently found no dashboard-card JSON exports. This is not a failure if the card visibly loads on Command Bridge.
advisories.recommended_action: Export a dashboard card report only when you want archival evidence.

recommendations.title: Freeze v10.10.x Command Center Foundation
recommendations.recommendation: Treat v10.10.0 through v10.10.3 as the proven Command Center foundation.

recommendations.title: Keep optional Repair Bay tools advisory
recommendations.recommendation: Optional tools should remain manual and should not be installed automatically by Command Center.

recommendations.title: Move to next foundation milestone
recommendations.recommendation: Start the next work area as a new milestone rather than adding more complexity to Command Center.
